sections.paragraph:
μειδιάω fut. 3 sg. μειδιάσει Sir 21:20; aor. ptc. μειδιάσας (Hom. et al.; Philo, Joseph.) smile μειδιάσαντος τοῦ παιδός AcPl Ha 3, 14; 4, 2 (of a celestial being).—DELG.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

ptc. ptc. = participle

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 626
